# AI Engineering Wiki

> The leading German-language knowledge base for AI Engineering, Sovereign AI, and EU AI Act Compliance. Free, open, community-driven.

## About
AI Engineering (ai-engineering.at) helps DACH SMEs deploy local AI systems that are GDPR-compliant, auditable, and production-ready. This wiki contains 100+ articles covering compliance, self-hosted AI infrastructure, tool guides, architecture patterns, and step-by-step tutorials.

## EU AI Act & Compliance
- [EU AI Act Guide](/compliance/eu-ai-act): Complete guide to EU AI Act requirements, timelines, and obligations
- [EU AI Act Checklist](/compliance/eu-ai-act-checkliste): Actionable compliance checklist for businesses
- [GDPR & AI Basics](/compliance/dsgvo-grundlagen): Data protection fundamentals for AI systems
- [AI Competence (Art. 4)](/compliance/ki-kompetenz-art4): AI literacy requirements under Article 4
- [Prohibited AI Practices](/compliance/verbotene-ai-praktiken): What the EU AI Act bans outright
- [DPIA for AI](/compliance/dpia): Data Protection Impact Assessments for AI systems
- [Chatbot Transparency](/compliance/chatbot-transparenzpflichten): Disclosure obligations for AI chatbots
- [AI Agent Legal Framework](/compliance/ai-agent-legal-framework): Legal considerations for autonomous AI agents
- [GDPR Compliance Check Tutorial](/en/tutorials/gdpr-compliance-check): Step-by-step GDPR compliance walkthrough
- [EU AI Act (EN)](/en/compliance/eu-ai-act-guide): English version of the EU AI Act guide
- [GDPR (EN)](/en/compliance/gdpr): English version of GDPR guide
- [Risk Categories (EN)](/en/compliance/risk-categories): AI risk classification under EU AI Act

## Self-Hosted AI & Infrastructure
- [Local vs Cloud AI](/grundlagen/lokal-vs-cloud): Why local AI beats cloud for privacy and cost
- [AI Cost Comparison](/grundlagen/ai-kosten-vergleich): Real cost analysis of local vs cloud AI
- [AI Stack Setup Tutorial](/en/tutorials/ai-stack-setup): Complete self-hosted AI stack deployment guide
- [Docker Compose AI Stack](/en/tutorials/docker-compose-ai-stack): Docker-based AI infrastructure setup
- [Proxmox Setup](/tools/proxmox-setup): Virtualization platform for AI workloads
- [AI Gateway Pattern](/en/architecture/ai-gateway-pattern): API gateway pattern for AI services
- [Inference Server](/en/architecture/inference-server): Running your own inference server
- [Microservices for AI](/en/architecture/microservices-for-ai): Microservice patterns for AI systems

## AI Tools & Guides
- [Ollama Tutorial](/tools/ollama-tutorial): Run LLMs locally with Ollama
- [n8n for Beginners](/tools/n8n-fuer-anfaenger): AI workflow automation with n8n
- [Model Selection Guide](/tools/model-selection): How to choose the right AI model
- [RAG Guide](/tools/rag-guide): Retrieval-Augmented Generation explained
- [MCP Servers](/tools/mcp-server): Model Context Protocol server setup
- [Grafana Monitoring](/tools/grafana-monitoring): Monitor your AI infrastructure
- [Docker vs Swarm](/tools/docker-vs-swarm): Container orchestration comparison
- [Open WebUI Setup](/en/tutorials/open-webui-setup): Deploy your own ChatGPT-like interface
- [Claude Code CLI](/en/tools/claude-code-cli): Using Claude Code as a development tool
- [Claude Code Hooks](/en/tools/claude-code-hooks): Automation hooks for Claude Code
- [GDPR Traffic Light](/en/tools/gdpr-traffic-light): Quick GDPR assessment tool for AI tools

## Comparisons
- [Claude vs ChatGPT](/en/comparisons/claude-vs-chatgpt): Feature comparison of major AI assistants
- [Ollama vs Cloud LLMs](/en/comparisons/ollama-vs-cloud-llms): Local vs hosted LLM comparison
- [n8n vs Zapier vs Make](/en/comparisons/n8n-vs-zapier-vs-make): Workflow automation platform comparison
- [LangChain vs LlamaIndex](/en/comparisons/langchain-vs-llamaindex): RAG framework comparison
- [Vector Databases](/en/comparisons/vector-databases): Comparing vector database options
- [Agent Frameworks](/en/comparisons/agent-frameworks): AI agent framework comparison
- [RAG vs Fine-Tuning](/en/comparisons/rag-vs-fine-tuning): When to use RAG vs fine-tuning
- [Cursor vs Claude Code](/en/comparisons/cursor-vs-claude-code): AI coding assistant comparison

## Architecture Patterns
- [Agent Orchestration Patterns](/patterns/agent-orchestration-patterns): Design patterns for multi-agent systems
- [Safety Hooks](/patterns/safety-hooks): Safety mechanisms for AI agents
- [Memory Management](/patterns/memory-management): State and memory for AI agents
- [Task Delegation](/patterns/task-delegation): Delegating work between AI agents
- [Self-Improving Agents](/patterns/self-improving-agents): Agents that learn from feedback
- [Heartbeat Monitoring](/patterns/heartbeat-monitoring): Health checking AI systems

## AI Concepts
- [What is an LLM](/grundlagen/was-ist-ein-llm): Large Language Models explained
- [RAG Explained](/en/concepts/rag-explained): Retrieval-Augmented Generation deep dive
- [Transformer Architecture](/en/concepts/transformer-architecture): The architecture behind modern AI
- [LoRA Adapters](/en/concepts/lora-adapters): Efficient model adaptation
- [Quantization](/en/concepts/quantization): Making models smaller and faster
- [Agent Orchestration](/grundlagen/was-ist-agent-orchestration): Multi-agent system coordination
- [Multi-Agent Systems](/grundlagen/multi-agent-systeme): Building teams of AI agents

## Security
- [API Key Security](/security/api-keys-sicher): Securing API keys for AI services
- [Self-Hosted Security](/security/self-hosted-sicherheit): Security for self-hosted AI
- [Prompt Injection](/en/security/prompt-injection): Defending against prompt injection attacks
- [LLM Red Teaming](/en/security/llm-red-teaming): Testing AI systems for vulnerabilities

## Research Papers
- [Attention Is All You Need](/papers/attention-is-all-you-need): The Transformer paper explained
- [RAG Paper](/papers/rag-paper): Original RAG research paper summary
- [LoRA Paper](/papers/lora-paper): Low-Rank Adaptation paper summary
- [ReAct Paper](/papers/react-paper): Reasoning and Acting in LLMs
- [Constitutional AI](/papers/constitutional-ai): Anthropic's alignment approach

## Clean Markdown for AI Agents
All articles are available as clean Markdown (no HTML, no JSX) for token-efficient consumption:
- Index: https://wiki.ai-engineering.at/md/index.json (all articles with metadata)
- Format: https://wiki.ai-engineering.at/md/{lang}/{category}/{slug}.md
- Example: https://wiki.ai-engineering.at/md/de/compliance/eu-ai-act-guide.md
- Example: https://wiki.ai-engineering.at/md/en/tutorials/build-rag-pipeline.md

### Key DE Articles (Markdown)
- [EU AI Act Guide](/md/de/compliance/eu-ai-act-guide.md): Complete EU AI Act guide for SMEs
- [DSGVO & AI](/md/de/compliance/dsgvo.md): GDPR fundamentals for AI systems
- [Ollama Setup](/md/de/grundlagen/ollama-setup.md): Local LLM setup with Ollama
- [n8n Einführung](/md/de/grundlagen/n8n-einfuehrung.md): AI workflow automation with n8n
- [Docker für AI](/md/de/grundlagen/docker-fuer-ai.md): Docker basics for AI workloads
- [RAG Erklärt](/md/de/konzepte/rag-erklaert.md): Retrieval-Augmented Generation explained
- [Agent Patterns](/md/de/patterns/agent-patterns.md): Design patterns for AI agents
- [KI-Bildgenerierung Kosten](/md/de/vergleiche/ki-bildgenerierung-kosten.md): Local vs cloud image generation costs

### Key EN Articles (Markdown)
- [EU AI Act Guide](/md/en/compliance/eu-ai-act-guide.md): English EU AI Act guide
- [Build RAG Pipeline](/md/en/tutorials/build-rag-pipeline.md): Step-by-step RAG implementation
- [Claude Code CLI](/md/en/tools/claude-code-cli.md): Using Claude Code as a dev tool
- [Agent Frameworks](/md/en/comparisons/agent-frameworks.md): AI agent framework comparison
- [Local LLM Setup](/md/en/tutorials/local-llm-setup.md): Complete local LLM deployment
- [AI Stack Setup](/md/en/tutorials/ai-stack-setup.md): Self-hosted AI stack deployment
